section_name: Identification Required for Vehicle near Mexican Border
text: On demand of a peace officer within 250 feet of the Mexican border at a checkpoint authorized by Section 411.0095 (Vehicle Theft Checkpoints at Border Crossing) , Government Code, as added by Chapter 497, Acts of the 73rd Legislature, Regular Session, 1993, the driver of a vehicle shall produce a driver’s license and proof of compliance with Chapter 601 (Motor Vehicle Safety Responsibility Act) .
markdown:
# Transp. Code
## Title 7
### Chapter 600. Misc. Provisions
##### § 600.002 — Identification Required for Vehicle near Mexican Border

On demand of a peace officer within 250 feet of the Mexican border at a checkpoint authorized by Section 411.0095 (Vehicle Theft Checkpoints at Border Crossing) , Government Code, as added by Chapter 497, Acts of the 73rd Legislature, Regular Session, 1993, the driver of a vehicle shall produce a driver’s license and proof of compliance with Chapter 601 (Motor Vehicle Safety Responsibility Act) .

*Acts 1995, 74th Leg., ch. 165, Sec. 1, eff. Sept. 1, 1995.*
